reviews.review_text: Great Park, well run, clean and friendly. Great location close to beach and shops.  Pet and human friendly.
This Park is well run and friendly.   Good sites, close to beach and shops.  The staff go out of their wy to make you feel welcome.  Pet and human friendly.

Phoned at 5.02pm today. Answerphone says “We’ll call you back soon.” No mention of new reduced hours on the phone message, nor on Google Maps.

So  I drive there. As I’m up close reading the sign, a thick-set Am Staff scares the life out of me, charging the glass and growling.

No human came out to call her off. Clearly this is their “go away” tactic.

Charming.

Guys, please inform us of your new reduced hours. Put them on your phone message and on Google Maps.

It’s really not nice as a solo traveller to be left out in the cold with nowhere to stay right on dusk.
And then set upon by your dog.

Luckily there are kind tourist park managers nearby who are taking in campers who are not aware of the winter hours.
Brea and Beau are fantastic hosts with outstanding customer service skills. Park is so well managed.
Lovely friendly caravan park. Best well equipped and clean Camp Kitchen I've ever come across. A chair in amenities for elderly might be good. Thankyou it was a pleasure staying.

It's a great little park. The only gripe is the wifi. We were right down the back and the wifi kept dropping out and I was getting messages that the router needs resetting. I rang the reception and told them the problem and I was told that the wifi is not great down in that area. Why advertise there is wifi all over the park knowing that its not. I walked around the park and checked the signal and the wifi works really well where all the permanent vans are. We have stayed in caravan parks thats 3-4 times the size and the wifi is excellent.

The park is located next to Blacksmiths Beach and the breakwall is a short walk away with great sunset views back toward Lake Macquarie.

Major supermarkets and other shops a 5 min drive over the bridge to Swansea.

The facilities are being gradually improved and updated but while one block was a bit tired it was clean and tidy.

Pool area is nice and modern and well cared for.

Some of the sites are a bit oddly shaped and a bit small but there’s room for modern, bigger, vans.

Easy drive into Newcastle and Belmont.
Lovely spot. Close to beaches ,small shops,and a great pub. Gets busy on weekends but not too bad.

We love this location, we have been here a few times, and have recommended the park to lots of friends.
I would have given 5 stars but noticed tiles in pool area above water line could do with a clean.
Have a big van so we're on a grassed site. Really nice central spot
We stayed a week power site , staff super friendly very helpful. Great location

4hrs of absolute noise pollution throught the park ( aka disc jockey) Sat 4 - 8pm council and management need reemed. Absolute zero interest from paying park patrons / travellers.
(Read the room). Sites are not on the generous side parking is squeezed.
The park was very good, all facilities  and good location. Friendly staff. I was a little disappointed that the site for my MH, I walked onto mainly dirt from my MH door entrance
Nice quiet and tidy park. Friendly staff and good location.

We are regular travellers who have covered most of the country. We were rather disappointed with a number of things during our stay.
- Sites were very small which is subjective
- management needs to police there rules and when there are issues not to throw the you out to the wolves who you had complained about for not having complied with park rules.
After that occurred we had the people we had complained about get rather aggressive with us.

We will not be returning again and will not recommend it to family and friends coming to the area
Love this place great community and excellent for kids to make some memories. Management makes sure the kids have free activites to do.

Neljä eri koodia piti osata jotta pystyi liikkumaan aluella.

Positiivista että alue sijaitsi lähellä rantaa ja oli rauhallinen. Huono asia oli että ranta oli hieman epäsiisti ja ympäristö ei ollut kovin viihtyisä.
Love it, great park and facilities.perfect position for a short stay, long stay. Just great. Just go there.

Stayed here prior to moving to friends' home. An excellent caravan park and we had an excellent cabin with all the mod cons. Table & chairs on the deck. The staff service was excellent and Brae couldn't have been more helpful. It was a pleasure to stay here.

Booked through my partner - avoid this campsite!

Dogs were walking around unsupervised and pooped on our site and another family’s site. The toilets and showers were very dirty, and there was even blood on one of the toilet doors that remained there throughout our whole stay! Also, the wifi didn’t work at all 👎🏻
All round pleasant experience. Sites a bit sandy and muddy but you get that sometimes when camping out. Clean ablutions. Camp kitchen a bit of a hike from where we were. Staff friendly and helpful.

This is on about this caravan park, but the way they actually manage the bookings for Morisset Showground. Unfortunately the place that used to manage it no longer does

I made a booking for December and sent an email asking about changing the dates and if I got a refund how much would it be? I have this email in writing and I get an email back saying I have cancelled the booking, they kept $30 and if I want to book again or change, I have to pay another $50, this is nothing short of ripping off people and they wonder why people don’t want to stay in caravan parks anymore when you’ve go ahead and do this.

Not once was I told I could not change my booking. Nor did I ask for it to be refunded. My email asked how much if I did refund would I get back that was not answered all I got was an email saying your booking has been cancelled. That was not what I asked. When I asked for it to be reinstated and they said well you need to pay a deposit again because we’ve already refunded you. How is that my problem when you ignored what I asked in an email and when he and did something and now want me to pay more.

The Showground itself is such a lovely place and when I booked in 2024 to stay there, it was managed by another caravan park with such lovely helpful stuff this time total opposite, or because they cannot read an email and stuffed up on their part
Great little Park close water pet friendly

Very friendly staff.
Relaxing atmosphere on the campsite, great facilities.

Lovely receptionist.
Low pressure water in showers, no proper camp kitchen, overpriced

Brae and Beau are just incredible,  nothing feels like too much trouble and they are always accommodating. Amenities are clean, lawns are regularly mowed so all sites are neat and maintained. Service in the office is great, plenty of essentials available in the office if you need something and can't make it to the shops.

Beach is close by, grannies pool is great for the kids. Our favourite spot, we always come back to!

Brae at Blacksmiths Holiday Park is an amazing customer service lady. If her colleagues there are a patch on her, they will also be amazing! She was so helpful in sorting out my booking I have had to cancel. But I will be promoting Blacksmiths to all I come in contact with just because of Brae! Thanks Brae. Wonderful.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We had a fantastic stay at Blacksmith Holiday Park! The whole place was very clean and had everything we needed. Our cabin was spacious, comfortable, and well-equipped. The outdoor facilities were great — clean BBQ areas and toilets conveniently located around the park. We also loved that the recreational hall was open for guests to use, and the soundproofing made it perfect for gatherings without disturbing others. Highly recommend this park for a relaxing and enjoyable getaway!
Great place near the beach and fishing in the channel

lovely relaxed park beautifully clean amenities , loved the free dog washing facility , although some of the trees are a bit suss. moved to an open space and could not fault it . park staff lovely , accomodating and kind. Plan to return in the near future.

We’ve stayed here for a little over a week and it’s been a great place which is central to Newcastle while we have been working in town. Some of the other surrounding caravan parks are more scenic however they are sometimes difficult to get a booking at. This was a great base and had all the same facilities as surrounding parks. There is a new children’s playground and rec room with a well maintained pool area.
Clean amenities

Beautiful staff very down to earth . This beautiful location  holiday destination is great for everyone relax by beach, surf, swim, fish by lakeor just take in the veiw    play little golf tennis jump out of a plane maybe  shop ,ride, walk,drive boat   it has everything for all ages such a welcoming park  has plenty  clean  amenities two large toilet  and shower blocks  and also private ensuites if you wish  all are  very clean  central and  locationsthat are  safe and lit up.  They have gates with  pin code acsess  easy  to walk lake or beach just stroll across the road also walking, riding, tracks   with both gates just stroll across  the road.  Relaxed plenty to do in and outside this holiday park new  lovely big camp kitchen big  outdoor fire pit and few great outdoor bbq and sinks camp kitchens  with large amount of seating while watching the kids play in the play ground or swim in the beautiful pool   must say it was great to feel welcome no matter of your budget to  not to be judged  guest and staff all friendly we don't all have 150k caravans but we  all deserve to relax enjoy your holiday no matter what income  they have thought of it all you can also bring  your furr babies (pets) instead of boarding kennels  they welcome but you must have them on lead and clean up after them that's comes with out saying .  Thankyou we will be back

I can only say that the staff were wonderful thanks guys see you all in April next year and thanks Jack for all your help you went beyond and was very helpful the amenities were perfect park was bit wet but we survived would highly recommend this park

Cabins, Caravan and camping sites. Power and unpowered. Some with ensuites. Very clean grounds and amenities.   BBQs with hot water and sinks for cleanup. I plan to check out the swimming pool tomorrow. Friendly service on arrival. The nice lady allowed us to change our site based on the size of our van and we wanted to be closer to the beach. Dogs allowed on lead with poop bag dispenser close by.
Lovely weekend spent at Blackies. Cabins were spotless and had everything we needed.
Just down the street from this park there is a cafe called SEED it’s incredible the food is the best !!

My wife and I spent a week in a tent on an ensuite site at Blacksmiths Beachside Holiday Park recently. Brae and Bianca could not have been more helpful from when we first made our enquiry to when we packed up and left. Beau was helpful as well. I'm not sure of the name of the lady who keeps the ensuites in order, but she also does an excellent job. It was a great week. Close to Blacksmiths Beach, Blacksmiths shops and a short walk to the Orana Hotel. Somehow they also provided excellent winter weather as well.

A lovely little park with large sites and friendly hosts. Close to the beach.
Amenities were very clean
Camp kitchen was very good. Showers were a disappointment. They were on a timer which seemed to differ dramatically from day to day... one went for 30 seconds !!
A frequent warm weather visitor. Wife loves the Granny Pool. Excellent park, great staff.
Wonderful place to stay with the kids

We have just stayed here for Easter long weekend and hired 2 cabins
Absolutely spotless cabins, with everything that you would need
Wonderful staff, Great amenities
Walking distance to beach
Close to shops, rsl, restaurants
Great activities for kids over Easter
Would highly recommended
Thank you to all the staff, including the cleaners, you are doing a wonderful job

We have stayed here a few times with our kids and dogs the staff are so friendly the amenities are clean showers are great best place to come with kids and pets Thankyou for the great Easter we have had in your park

Stayed here many times.  The acting managers now run the operation and it is even better than before!  We stay in the 2bedroom cabins and they are great.  Just a short walk to the beach and breakwater.  Dog friendly.  Mamma’s pizza’s also just down the road, yum!  Short walk to Orana Hotel.  Great place to stay!

Nice park but too many codes. You even had to have a code to get OUT of the pool. My wife is not the tallest person in the world or the shortest but she had to get someone to open the gate from outside so she go back to our van. You needed a code to go out of the gate to go for walk, never had that before.
They have gone overboard on the codes to the extent I would not return for that reason. It almost like once your in the park they don't want you to leave.
We had booked a site but when we arrived there was someone on our allocated site, bad management .

Fabulous park in a great location. We stayed in our own van and the sites are great. Clean amenities and easy access to the beach and the channel. The staff were all super friendly and obliging. We will definitely return.
Great place! Very close to the beach, good amenities
Sorry, but the only caravan site we could book was next to the rubbish bins, which smelled like,  well, you know what.

Beautiful well kept caravan park.  We stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin, it was fantastic, well kept & appointed, love the ice cold air conditioning, when we weren't sitting on the balcony having drinks with family & friends.  Walking distance to beach, cafe, pub, bakery etc.  Perfect spot to spend a weekend or a week.  The staff are a standout as well, very welcoming & accomodating.  Thanks for a great weekend!

Staff were very friendly. Located 200 metres from the beach & Lake Macquarie. Flat area with pedestrian & bike tracks to get adventurous. Walking distance to Swansea. Beach has a breakwall with fabulous views to the north & south. Park was crowdy with tourists, some sites too close to each other

Very busy on weekends, quiet during the week. All amenities working, tidy, and well organised. Take on advice regarding preventatice use of aerogard and anti-insect stuff. Can't see them, but the itchy bites will tell you they were there. Great spot.

Great location and facilities, kids had a great time. Clean toilets & showers.

Site has a problem with sandflies/midges which love to eat humans and have very irritable bites. Strong deet required if management don’t the site more regularly.
Took the caravan out for a little get away. Great little park.
Excellent, midge bites a problem
Awesome spot. Close to the surf club where we attended my uncles wedding 💑
Only visited but a beautifully kept park xx
We booked an unpowered site for 2 nights. It was very clean and tidy. A very nice quiet place. A credit to the people running it. We will be back !!!
로드 트립 중 들린 캠핑장입니다. 편안한 분위기와 샤워장과 화장실이 깨끗했어요.💫
It's always lovely to stay at Blacksmith Caravan Park.

Our sporting team had a great stay - everything matched our expectations.||I'm adding a review though because of the extra effort from manager Brae.  I'd leave some valuables in our room after we left.  It was no trouble for her to retrieve, wrap and hold them while I arranged a courier to pick them up.  I thought it was all going to be stressy - but it was easy as.  Thanks Brae.

We went to the Blacksmith caravan park to meet up with friends just back from a 23k trip around au staying at many good and bad parks, they settled in a good grassy site, their amenities were good,modern and clean. The park have security cameras setup in good spots, a new very modern Bbq area opening soon. We are van travellers also but not around au,and stayed in quite a few caravan parks in NSW and would rate Blacksmith park an 8+ out 10. We might in spring do a weekend there ourselves, the units were booked out with 1 bus load leaving earlier and a new one arriving..
Staff very friendly but sites too small for our van so they assisted us with going over to sister Park at Swansea Lakeside. Thank you for your understanding and help.

Fantastic Park from staff to location can't fault this place. Amazing beach a natural inlet pool for swimming and great break wall for fishing. This place has everything and very peaceful. Highly recommend. Enjoy
Great location for relaxing, with beach access and fantastic fishing you will not be stuck for things to do. The park has great amenities and with its friendly staff will keep you returning.
Really nice little Caravan park, close the the water, nice clean facilities, decent rates.
Very good service and very helpful service.

We had a very enjoyable stay here. The facilities are top notch and service was excellent. Location is great too with the beach less than five minutes stroll away and Blacksmiths village a similar distance in the opposite direction. There is a playground in the park and another one just outside the park that my kids loved.  The pool was a good size and the BBQ's and camp kitchen were modern and clean.
A great park
Gut organisierter, sauberer Campingplatz mit warmen Duschen und WIFI. Alles supergut. Kurzer Weg zum Strand. Restaurant auch zu Fuß erreichbar.

Great location , short stroll to the beach. This was a lovely place to stay. So very clean with good facilities. Our very first time away with our caravan was made easy by the owners who were very helpful. Would highly recommend.
Great facilities, really clean, great position.

Great little park close to the beach staff very accommodating would definitely recommend this park great pool  enjoyed our stay will definitely return here e we hen up this way again
Thanks Rose
Anna & George Pampanella

We had a fantastic short weekend away at Blacksmiths Holiday Park. Staff were friendly, great location close to the beach, playgrounds and local cafe's.
Cabin was clean, with good amount of appliances and utensils etc.
Communal BBQ's are well looked after with fresh cleaning supplies left on each BBQ daily.
Look forward to staying again!

Lovely place, beautiful views, clean, tidy and nice near new BBQs and Tv/games room. Good sized pool 🏊 and kiddie pool with shaded area. Great little play ground. Plenty of seating. Short walk to beach 🏖️ Would recommend to check out for your next get away. You can also bring your fur baby too as they have pet 🐶 friendly cabins. Brae and Beau are wonderful and make the park all the more welcoming 😊 Thank you so much guys will be seeing you again 🤩⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Very well run clean and good facilities in a quiet location right on the waterfront

There was dead grass and hay everywhere, and it was messing up inside our tent when the wind blew. I would suggest the management take care of this, or put in slabs instead of grass.

Additionally, I was bitten by a lot of sand flies at the campsite, as there was a drain behind our tent, so the flies were everywhere. I had a horrible camping experience!

I've spent 7 nights on a Caravan site with ensuite. All the sites are different in size, so it's very important that you check your site size vs your equipment. My site was very tight, but availability was limited when i booked back in July. Ensuite facilities are on point, very clean and generous in size, park is well maintained, great kids activities during holidays, nice pool, quick and easy access to the beach and swansea channel. Will definately add this to my revisit list.
Great atmosphere! Great location!
Camped on a rainy night and there was plenty of shelter around that the rain didn’t both us. Nice clean amenities and friendly admin staff.
Such friendly staff, no noise, clean amenities lovely setting. Caravan sites good
Have spent a weekend at this holiday park. Clean  bathrooms, no disruption and great service.
Good service but it was very crowded

We recently purchased an onsite van at Blacksmiths Beach Holiday Park.
The team were so welcoming to us and our 3 boys.
The park amenities are wonderful and well maintained. We look forward to spending a lot of time up here and are excited to be a part of the Lake Mac family.
Well done team, we will be recommending your park to our friends and family.
** If it gave the option for 10 stars you would get it for sure!
Stayed there for the weekend
Did not go there
Very clean and well maintained park and the staff are friendly and helpful. We especially enjoyed the car wash bay!

Amenities smelt..

If you like sandflies....book..

6 family members have bites all over us...
This place is fantastic, it has all the services you need. BBQ areas, pool 🏊‍♀️ , tables tennis, and plenty more. The staff are amazing 🤩. I will definitely be coming back very soon.

Me and my family stayed here for 2 nights on our way to Sydney. We got a cabin and checked in. When we walked into the cabin it was nice and clean for us. The beds were comfortable and the bathroom was clean. The park itself is really nice and quiet. It's close to the beach and surf club too. The only problem we ran into was our stove didn't work so we had to cook on the barbecue.  ||Overall we would definitely come back next time.

Good park with some very new amenities. Unfortunately they had some plumbing issues in the new toilet block for most of the 3 days we were there, but the "old" bathroom were still exceptional for there age and actually very nice, clean and usable.
The bbqs/sink area was especially good and helpful, and providing new scrubbing and cleaning tools each night was going above and beyond!
The parents' room was clean, neat, and a pleasure to bathe the kids in.

The only unfortunate thing was the code situation. 4 different codes are a bit much. 1 for entrance, 1 for amenities, 1 for pool & 1 for back gates means you need to carry your phone to remember them when you need them!
Nope! Not for me. Very crowded, over expensive for what it is. No shade and not on the beachside at all.

Nice well set out park. Close to lovely beach and a small strip of shops. Amenities block was clean. Showers were on a timer. I know water is a valuable resource so fair enough. But the timer was outside the cubicle, so you can't see when the time's running out. Also you need to be ready to get in the shower as soon as you turn on the timer, difficult when it's outside the cubicle. Not ideal!

This is a neat and tidy holiday park with friendly staff/owners at reception. The close walking distance (5 minutes) to Blacksmith's Beach was handy. The amenities closest to us were clean, and soon, there will be a nicely renovated amenities block because the holiday park has construction underway at present (August 2023).
Lovely place..visited family there

Wonderful experience with the staff / caretakers. Friendly and helpful.
We had an ensuite site along with space for our extra car and van.
The location worked out well, and we enjoyed the great beach adjacent.
Good value also!
Great place
Best place to go with family or friendsfor kids and pets Friendly Write next to shops and beach best place to camp

Stayed two nights in my campervan. Staff were awesome, they offered to relocate me, thank you Team.
Amenities were very clean and tidy. Overall a great place to go to and have a look around, beach and fishing.
Will definitely be back.
